blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: 'A brutal innings' - Seifert's best strikes of his half-century. Manchester Super Giants' Tim Seifert hits 67 off 45 balls - an innings that included nine boundaries - to help set London Spirit 139 to win in their opening fixture of the 2026 men's Hundred.
